title: Variable Team Size Support
description: Refactor /gruai-agents skill and CLI scaffolding to support Starter (4: COO+CTO+FS+CEO), Standard (7: +CPO+FE+BE+QA), Full (11: all roles), Custom (pick from role list, minimum COO+CTO+1 builder enforced). Agent-registry.json handles variable teams. Game dashboard renders partial teams gracefully.

dod.criterion: /gruai-agents supports Starter (4), Standard (7), Full (11), and Custom team presets with minimum enforcement
agent-registry.json correctly represents variable team sizes with dynamic team membership
Game dashboard renders partial teams gracefully with empty seats for missing agents

tasks.title: Add team size presets and validation to /gruai-agents skill
tasks.user_scenario: When running /gruai-agents, the user picks a team size (Starter/Standard/Full/Custom) and gets exactly that many agents scaffolded with validated minimum requirements.
tasks.scope: Refactor SKILL.md to prompt for team size before generating agents. Define four presets: Starter (4), Standard (7), Full (11), Custom. Enforce minimum: COO+CTO+1 builder.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md Step 1 includes a team-size selection prompt with Starter (4), Standard (7), Full (11), and Custom options
Starter preset includes exactly CEO, COO, CTO, FS roles; Standard adds CPO, FE, BE, QA; Full adds DE, UX, CB
Custom mode enforces minimum of COO + CTO + at least 1 builder role, rejecting invalid selections
Steps 3, 5, and 6 reference the selected team size and only generate entries for chosen agents

tasks.title: Make agent-registry.json and team definitions handle variable membership
tasks.user_scenario: A Starter team's agent-registry.json contains only 4 agents and correctly-populated teams with only present members.
tasks.scope: Update SKILL.md Step 3 to generate variable-sized registries. Only include selected agents, dynamically build team definitions, omit empty teams, add teamSize field to registry root.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md Step 3 generates agents array with only selected-role agents plus CEO
Teams with zero present members are omitted from the teams array entirely
Teams with a missing lead agent fall back to the first available member as lead
A top-level 'teamSize' field (starter|standard|full|custom) is added to the registry schema
gruai.config.json agents array matches the variable team (Step 6 updated)

tasks.title: Game dashboard renders partial teams gracefully
tasks.user_scenario: A user with a 4-agent Starter team sees their pixel-art office with only 4 characters at desks — empty seats show as unoccupied furniture.
tasks.scope: Harden game rendering for partial teams. Verify OFFICE_AGENTS filters correctly, TeamPanel handles missing teams, GameHeader staffCount works with variable counts, CanvasOffice handles fewer agents.

dod.criterion: types.ts OFFICE_AGENTS correctly produces a 4-agent array when only 4 agents have game fields in registry
TeamPanel.tsx skips teams with zero present members and filters memberAgentIds to only show agents that exist
GameHeader staffCount displays correct count with no hardcoded assumptions
CanvasOffice.tsx addAgent loop works with any number of OFFICE_AGENTS entries without errors
